compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect behavioral drift prevention enhancements
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new scope-drift reviewer agent, enhanced intent-search agent, and fix-bug workflow changes.
**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the new gate step, INTENT_CONFLICT signal, scope-drift classification, and config keys.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md (agent routing table for scope-drift-reviewer, intent-search description update, config reference for scope_drift.enabled), update CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (scope_drift.enabled key), update docs/reference/domain-logic.md (new gate and signal types), update ADR-0003 if needed (new INTENT_CONFLICT outcome)
- OUT: No new documentation files — updates only

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md agent routing table includes dso:scope-drift-reviewer with model: sonnet and its dispatch context
  ← Satisfies: "Both enhancements integrate into the existing fix-bug workflow"
- When this story is complete, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md documents the scope_drift.enabled config key with default value and behavior description
  ← Satisfies: Scenario: "scope_drift.enabled config key (default: true)"
- When this story is complete, docs/reference/domain-logic.md includes the scope-drift gate and INTENT_CONFLICT signal type in the gate reference table
  ← Satisfies: "Both enhancements integrate into the existing fix-bug workflow"

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Done definition update (adversarial review): Must explicitly update CLAUDE.md agent routing table with dso:scope-drift-reviewer row (model: sonnet, dispatched by: /dso:fix-bug Step 7.1). CLAUDE.md is the canonical registry read by all agents.
comments.author: Test
